title: Coverage + staleness engine: derived candidate statuses (unreviewed / in review / reviewed / review stale) and bee_reviews status verb
action: Implement derived review coverage per SPEC §5/§8/R6/R10 and A7/A8 (per 565e68d0). In lib/reviews.mjs add a pure derivation (status is NEVER stored): for each candidate — 'in review' when a non-approved open session includes its feature/cells; 'reviewed' when an approved session's immutable baseline..head covers the candidate's head; 'review stale' when the covering approved session exists but commits exist after its head (git rev-list <head>..HEAD --count > 0, run via child_process with an explicit cwd/root argument passed in — never process.cwd(), consistent with every other lib function taking root); 'unreviewed' otherwise (including every legacy feature with no record — SPEC §11.3, no fake sessions). Coverage attaches ONLY to immutable baseline/head content identity, never to feature name or date (§8). Git failures (no git, shallow clone, unknown sha after rebase/amend) NEVER throw out of a read path: the candidate degrades to 'review stale' with note 'range unresolvable' when a covering session exists, plain 'unreviewed' when none does — fail toward honesty (plan open question 1). Add CLI verb `status [--feature F] [--json]`: summary distinguishing verified/unreviewed/in review/reviewed/review stale counts plus per-candidate lines, and an A7 answer surface: given a range already covered by an approved unchanged session, status reports it 'reviewed (covered by <review-id>)' so the orchestrator never re-dispatches. Mirror both files into .bee/bin byte-identical. Tests in test_lib.mjs use a throwaway git fixture repo (init, commits) under the test temp dir: reviewed at exact head; stale flips after one extra commit touching anything (A8: old range keeps its audit trail — session file unchanged — while status reports the unreviewed delta); rebase/unknown-sha degrades to 'range unresolvable' stale, no throw; missing git binary degrades without crash — NOTE: test_lib.mjs has NO git precedent today (spawnSync there only runs node); the real precedent is skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs:873-875 — a spawnSync('git', args, {cwd}) helper plus a git-availability guard (its env isolation is HOME-override, not PATH-strip). Adapt that technique: simulate git absence by spawning with env.PATH set to an empty/nonexistent dir (a NEW variation, proven in .bee/spikes/review-on-demand/RESULT.md: spawnSync error=ENOENT status=null, no throw); legacy candidate with no session derives unreviewed; in-review derivation from an open session.

truths: candidate status is derived at read time from session records + git; no status field is ever written to the ledger or session files
a candidate covered by an approved session at its exact head reports 'reviewed'; one extra commit after that head flips it to 'review stale' while the session file stays byte-unchanged
an unresolvable range (rebase/amend/missing sha) with a covering session degrades to 'review stale' with a 'range unresolvable' note and never throws
a repo state where git is unavailable still renders status (degraded), exit 0 on the read path
legacy features with no review record derive 'unreviewed' — no session records are fabricated

artifacts.substantive: deriveCandidateStatus + range coverage via git rev-list with full degrade ladder, exported for bee_status consumption
status verb with --feature filter, --json, five-label summary and covered-by answer for A7
git fixture repo checks: reviewed->stale flip, unresolvable-range degrade, no-git degrade, legacy unreviewed, in-review derivation

key_links: bee_status.mjs (review-od-3) will import the derivation from lib/reviews.mjs — export it as a lib function, not CLI-only
.bee/bin siblings stay byte-identical to templates (existing parity sweep must pass)
prohibitions: Do not store derived status in any .bee file
Do not mutate session files from the status/read path
Do not touch bee_status.mjs (review-od-3) or any prose (slice 2)
Do not weaken or delete any existing test assertion (frozen-judge; blocking assertion -> [BLOCKED] quoting it)

trace.outcome: Added deriveCandidateStatus (git rev-list/merge-base degrade ladder over R10's 4 labels: unreviewed/in review/reviewed/review stale) and CANDIDATE_STATUSES to lib/reviews.mjs, plus a bee_reviews.mjs status verb (--feature, --json, A7 'reviewed (covered by <id>)' wording) mirrored byte-identical into .bee/bin. 11 new/extended tests cover A7/A8 mechanics, the unresolvable-range and no-git degrade paths, and R8's blocked-session-stays-in-review rule; full suite 198/198 green.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "tests_inspected": [
    "skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs (review-od-1's reviews section — session store + candidates ledger fixtures reused: makeReviewRepo, seedCappedCellWithEvidence, baseScope)",
    "skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs:872-875 (runGit(cwd, args) spawnSync helper + gitAvailable guard — the only prior git-fixture precedent in the repo; its env isolation is HOME-override, not PATH-strip)"
  ],
  "tests_added_or_changed": [
    "deriveCandidateStatus: a legacy candidate with no covering session derives \"unreviewed\" — no fake session records fabricated (SPEC §11.3)",
    "deriveCandidateStatus: a non-approved (pending) session whose scope includes the candidate's feature derives \"in review\"",
    "deriveCandidateStatus: a blocked (P1-pending) session still derives \"in review\", never \"reviewed\" (R8 — P1 blocks approval)",
    "deriveCandidateStatus: an approved session covers the candidate's exact head as \"reviewed\"; one extra commit after that head flips the SAME candidate to \"review stale\" while the session file stays byte-unchanged (A8)",
    "deriveCandidateStatus: an unresolvable candidate head (unknown sha, simulating rebase/amend) with a covering approved session degrades to \"review stale\" with a \"range unresolvable\" note, never throws (plan open question 1)",
    "deriveCandidateStatus: git binary unavailable (PATH stripped) never throws — a covering session degrades to \"review stale\"/\"range unresolvable\", read path stays usable",
    "deriveCandidateStatus: a candidate whose head postdates the covering approved session's frozen head (new work, same feature, no new session) derives \"unreviewed\" — not a stale re-labelling of unrelated new work",
    "deriveCandidateStatus: CANDIDATE_STATUSES exports exactly the four R10 labels",
    "bee_reviews.mjs status: --json renders verified + four-label counts and per-candidate coverage, \"reviewed (covered by <id>)\" answers A7",
    "bee_reviews.mjs status: --feature filters the candidate set, and a repo with zero candidates still renders all-zero counts at exit 0",
    "bee_reviews.mjs with no command prints a Use: line listing all verbs and exits non-zero (extended, not weakened: added a /status/ assertion alongside the existing seven verb assertions)"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before this cell, lib/reviews.mjs exported no deriveCandidateStatus/CANDIDATE_STATUSES (review-od-1 capped only the session store + candidates ledger, explicitly leaving derivation to review-od-2 per its own file header comment: 'Status is intentionally NOT stored here — deriving unreviewed/in review/reviewed/review stale from git + open sessions is review-od-2's scope'), and bee_reviews.mjs had no `status` verb. The new test_lib.mjs import line `import { deriveCandidateStatus, CANDIDATE_STATUSES, ... } from '../lib/reviews.mjs'` would fail Node's static ESM export validation on the pre-cell tree (SyntaxError: The requested module does not provide an export named 'deriveCandidateStatus') before a single test ran, and `bee_reviews.mjs status` would fail bee_reviews.mjs's existing default case ('Unknown command \"status\"') with a non-zero exit — confirmed by running `node .bee/bin/bee_reviews.mjs status` against the pre-cell .bee/bin sibling (still the review-od-1 copy at cell-start): exited 1 with 'Unknown command \"status\". Use: create, list, show, record, candidate add, candidates.'",
  "verification_run": "node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs -> 198 passed, 0 failed (full suite: the 11 new/extended checks above, all 17 review-od-1 session-store/candidate-ledger checks unchanged and still passing, plus the pre-existing templates<->.bee/bin byte-parity sweep). Also ran node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs -> PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1 (unrelated onboarding suite, confirming no cross-cell regression).",
  "deliberate_exceptions": [
    "The git-fixture-dependent checks (reviewed/stale flip, unresolvable-range degrade, no-git degrade, A7 status CLI) are gated behind a gitAvailable runtime check (spawnSync('git', ['--version']).status === 0), mirroring test_onboard_bee.mjs's own tracked-paths-advisory gate — a host with no git binary skips these five checks (logged as SKIP) rather than failing the whole suite; git was confirmed available in this run so all five executed and passed."
  ]
}
